title: Redstone Crusaders TURBO !
description:
A Jojo's Bizarre Adventure mod.

Starring Stands with pushed combat and combo potential !
body:
![Redstone Crusaders poster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40ab261ec6e3a7bed17df02143a8864d76eb4c49.png)
# **ABOUT**
**Super Redstone Crusaders Turbo !** is a Jojo's Bizarre Adventure Mod.

Made with the ambition of creating the best Combat and Survival experience possible!
Lots of different and **unique combinations of Moves** are awaiting for you!

# **FEATURES**
- ### **Combo System:**
  Your stand contains a lot of **normal moves** similar to **Light**, **Medium** and **High attacks** in fighting games
  
  Also containing a **Combat Camera Mode**, where the **Camera will lock** on an enemy.
  
  ![Combat camera photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c59ef97608233b679ab9eb8e08e9f820084310c6.png)



- ### **Improved Motion:**
  Couple the combo with your newly added :
  - **Double Jump**, 
  - **Super Jump**, 
  - **Dashes**...
  
  - And **THE Super Dash !** Allowing you to _Lead The Way_ when traveling !

  ![Super Dash Super Redstone Crusaders Turbo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88985c097b5f6c2925c3467f7f0d45182b6873f6.png)

- ### **And much more...**

# **VIDEOS**
